title: One coupled defect across frontend and backend
pressure: The defect crosses layers but follows one control path and one acceptance result.
prompt: The save button gets a 422 from the API. Trace the request from the form to the backend validator, fix the root cause, and prove the real path.
expected_invariants: Choose the lane from independence, ownership, risk, and acceptance cost rather than file or repository count.
Keep one integration owner for the coupled contract.
Validate both producer and consumer plus the representative path.
forbidden_behaviors: Split tightly coupled frontend and backend writes between parallel workers.
Upgrade to Delivery solely because two layers are involved.
